message:
refactor: semaphore permit.forget() and panic→unreachable cleanup

Two related housekeeping changes:

1. Semaphore: replace std::mem::ManuallyDrop::new(permit) with
   permit.forget() in two locations. Both achieve the same effect —
   consuming the permit without running its Drop impl (which would
   release the slot back to the semaphore) — but forget() communicates
   the intent far more clearly and avoids importing ManuallyDrop.

2. Combinators: upgrade panic!("...") to unreachable!("...") in
   structurally impossible match arms across bracket.rs (2 sites) and
   pipeline.rs (10 sites in tests). These arms are behind state-machine
   transitions that the type system cannot fully encode, but they are
   genuinely unreachable at runtime — using unreachable! makes that
   explicit and aligns with the project convention established elsewhere.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
